text: Dnyanganga Education provides academic guidance and mock board exam preparation for students to help them achieve success in their studies.
The institute focuses on helping students prepare for board exams through structured mock tests and expert guidance.
The programs are designed for students of 10th and 12th standards preparing for board examinations.
The vision is to transform lives through innovative and high-quality education and to become a leader in the education sector.
The mission is to inspire students to learn continuously and develop intellectually, physically, and emotionally to succeed in a changing world.
The objective is to spread education, support society, and contribute to overall student development.
The institute offers academic programs and mock board exam preparation courses designed to improve student performance.
Courses are designed and structured scientifically to match different student levels and maximize learning outcomes.
Mock board exams are conducted to help students practice, evaluate performance, and improve before actual board exams.
The institute celebrates student achievements and academic excellence through its programs and results.
Thousands of students have achieved their academic goals through the institute's training and mock exam programs.
The institute provides a structured and supportive learning environment focused on improving student performance.
The teaching approach focuses on practical learning, regular assessments, and continuous improvement.
Students can join the institute to improve their exam performance through expert guidance, structured courses, and practice exams.
The institute regularly conducts academic events, mock exams, and activities to support student learning.
Students and parents can contact the institute for course details, admissions, and support.
For 10th standard students, Dnyanganga Education offers two packages: 9th+10th combined package and only 10th package.
The fee for the 9th+10th package is ₹6850. Students receive book sets for both 9th and 10th standards.
The fee for the 10th-only package is ₹6850. Students receive book sets for 10th standard.
For 12th standard students, Dnyanganga Education offers two packages: 11th+12th combined package and only 12th package.
The fee for the 11th+12th package is ₹9850. Students receive book sets for both 11th and 12th standards.
The fee for the 12th-only package is ₹7900. Students receive book sets for 12th standard.
Proctored mock board exams are conducted for 10th and 12th students following state board guidelines at physical exam centers.
Subjects for 10th standard exams include Mathematics, Science, and English.
Subjects for 12th standard exams include Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Biology, and MHT-CET preparation.
Mock board exams are conducted in December and January. Hall tickets with timetable are provided before the exam.
Registration is done through a counsellor by visiting students directly. Initial fees are collected during registration.
During registration, students must provide their educational and personal details.
Students can choose their preferred exam center during the registration process.
Students receive their book set from the counsellor after clearing the remaining fees.
Students receive regular updates and notifications via messages after registration.
Students can download their hall ticket from the official website: https://dnyangangaeducation.com/hallticket
Guest lectures and career guidance seminars are conducted before the exams to help students prepare.
Students must visit their selected exam center and appear for the exam as per the provided timetable.
Students can download their exam results from the official website: https://dnyangangaeducation.com/result
Top-performing and eligible students receive updates regarding scholarship opportunities after results.
